title: Property assignments should not be made for readonly fields not constrained to reference types
description: Property assignments should not be made for "readonly" fields not constrained to reference typesAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalreliabilityBugQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoWhile the properties of areadonlyreference typefield can still be changed after initialization, those of areadonlyvalue typefield, such as astruct, cannot.If the member could be either aclassor astructthen assignment to its properties could be unreliable, working sometimes but not others.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CI©2025SonarSource Sàrl. All rights reserved.Privacy Policy|Cookie Policy|Terms of Use
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

logic.detection_conditions: Identifies property assignments on readonly fields that could be value types, where the assignment would have no effect
logic.triggering_conditions: Pattern matches 'readonly[Field].[Property] = [value]' where the field could be a value type (struct)
exclusion_conditions: Variable declarations containing readonly field references
Return statements containing readonly field references
Known reference types (StringBuilder, String, Object, List, Array, Dictionary, etc.)
Generic types constrained to reference types (where T : class)
never_trigger_on: Known reference types (StringBuilder, String, Object, List, etc.)
Generic types with reference type constraints
logic.reasoning: Detects property assignments on readonly fields that could be value types (structs). When a readonly field contains a value type, property assignments have no effect because you're modifying a copy, not the original. The regex pattern looks for 'readonly[Field].[Property] = [value]' but excludes method calls, comparisons, and known reference types where such assignments are valid.

should_not_trigger: readonly T field where T : class; field.Property = value;
